# Bantu Pools

> Professional swimming pool services in Johannesburg & surrounds, South Africa: weekly pool cleaning and chemical balancing, equipment repairs (pumps, filters, heaters, leak detection), and complete pool renovations and resurfacing. 15+ years of experience, licensed and insured, with free same-day quotes via WhatsApp.

## Services

- **Pool cleaning & maintenance**: weekly visits covering skimming, vacuuming, basket emptying, waterline tile brushing and precise chlorine/pH balancing. Green-to-clean rescues for neglected pools, usually sparkling again within days.
- **Equipment repairs**: pump diagnostics, filter cleaning and sand replacement, gas and electric heater repair, pressure testing for hidden leaks.
- **Renovations & resurfacing**: replastering (quartz, pebble, marble plaster), modern glass/ceramic tiling, LED lighting, coping repair.

## Contact

- WhatsApp / phone: +27 83 688 3238 (https://wa.me/27836883238)
- Hours: Monday–Saturday, 07:00–17:00; 24/7 emergency call-outs
- Service area: Johannesburg and surrounding areas, South Africa
- Quotes: free — WhatsApp a photo of the pool for a same-day quote

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.bantupools.co.za/): overview, before/after results, recent projects, reviews, FAQ
- [Services](https://www.bantupools.co.za/services.html): detailed breakdown of cleaning, repairs and renovation services
